title: lavandula bipinnata var. nimmoi
intro: Lavandula bipinnata var. nimmoi, also known as the Nimmo's lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats of India and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of Lavandula bipinnata var. nimmoi include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
